body:
This PR nukes the last two broken tests: deep convection which has been stale and broken for months, and the example test which was never working anyways.

Now that we're back to having no broken tests, would be nice to keep it that way.

labels.description: Tests get priority in case of emergency evacuation
labels.name: testing 🧪

title: Nuke broken tests

body:
Most of the sandbox scripts are very stale and could be misleading so I'm nuking them.

Simulation scripts should go in respective repositories at this point.

Sandbox scripts that are worth making into examples can go into `examples/`.
title: Nuke sandbox
